programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew's very personal and fun storytelling comedy, combined with his exemplary work ethic has earned him high praise from some of the best comedians in the business. Andrew is a featured writer, actor, and comedian on the TV show “UpLate NW.” Andrew has been featured on NBC, FOX, and the Bob & Tom Radio Show and is a regular opening act for Christopher Titus. Andrew was also featured on the popular Buzzfeed web series “Truth or Drink“, has performed in over 35 states and his new podcast called “Don't Quit Your Night Job” was featured in the Seattle Times.

programme.title: Lee Hardin
programme.desc: Lee Hardin is a comedian known for making bad decisions and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9? tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years ago a lump appeared on his right thigh. It's not visible from the stage but according to some kids at the water park, it looks creepy. Many people say Bengt looks kind of like a monkey. Bengt Washburn was born in Salt Lake City, Utah but grew up in a large Utah town (1,200 people) as the fifth child in a small Mormon family (7 children). Bengt is married to an officer in the United States Airforce. They have lived in 6 different cities over the last eleven years. Most recently he moved to Springfield, Virginia (Washington D.C.) after living in Stuttgart, Germany for 3 years. Bengt is a former winner of the prestigious San Francisco International Comedy Competition. He has been seen on The Late Late Show with Craig Fergusen, Live at Gotham on Comedy Central and most recently Conan on TBS. He was invited to perform at the Vancouver International Comedy Festival, The Boston Comedy Festival, the Aspen Laff Festival and Gilda's Laugh Fest in Grand Rapids, Michigan. He's been heard on NPR, PRI and Bob and Tom. All three of his comedy Cd's can be heard playing on XM Sirius radio. Most people who know him would say Bengt is a logistically impaired ditz, but his comedy is described as intelligent, surprisingly universal considering the content matter and profoundly funny.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: As a mother of seven, Chelle T has seen it all, and shes not afraid to joke about it. Quippy and honest, Chelle T talks about how children are raised differently these days, menopause, being married for twenty-three years, and how desperate you sometimes become when youre a mom in this special.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes.
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time . . . two things she subsequently gave up for her goal weight.

programme.title: Joe Devito
programme.desc: Joe DeVito's dead-on timing and unexpected twists make him a favorite at comedy clubs across the USA. His TV appearances include The Late Late Show, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central, Comics Unleashed, and AXStv's Gotham Comedy Live. He's also a regular on TV news panels, finding the funny in pop culture and current events. Joe's albums First Date with Joe DeVito and Three's Comedy are in regular rotation on SiriusXM radio.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

programme.title: Craig Ferguson I'm Here To Help
programme.desc: Craig Ferguson unleashes his trademark stream-of-consciousness comedy before a sold-out crowd, riffing on fatherhood, Helen of Troy and shark penises.

programme.title: Mike Guido: Sanity Optional
programme.desc: Mike Guido has made his mark as a nationally known headlining comedian.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Lil Rel Howery
programme.desc: Lil Rel Howery talks about everything from his upbringing to raising his own children to getting roasted by teenagers on public transportation.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Plastic Cup Boyz
programme.desc: Joey Wells, Will Spank Horton, and Na'im Lynn take the stage in this comedy special taped at the House of Blues in San Diego.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Keith Robinson
programme.desc: Keith Robinson brings his in-your-face style to everything from the moment he stopped liking his own son to the real reason why Obama was elected.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this bio-pic about Evel Knievel! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they spectacularly fail to jump Snake River Canyon and see Viva Knievel!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: The Home of the Future
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short that takes a look at future living. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for The Home of the Future!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Sebastian Dellacourt is leading a double life: he tells his wife that he's a humble systems analyst. But he's actually a D-list actor starring in films by the director of Time Chasers and Radical Jack! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this Italian Jaws rip off. So get in the boat and join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Last Shark!

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Small-time crooks Eddie and Paul are in over their heads when a cute London lawyer hires them to steal a rare jewel. Meanwhile, a mullet-haired gangster wants the gem for himself. Bullets and sparks fly in this pond-hopping comedic caper.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, Detective John Dromoor is dismayed as to the lack of justice and plots revenge.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Upon discovering a den of corrupt policemen, a journalist (Justin Timberlake) joins forces with his editor (Morgan Freeman) and a renowned private detective (Kevin Spacey) to bring the force down.

programme.title: Deadline
programme.desc: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time.

programme.title: Love, Bubbles & Crystal Cove
programme.desc: The movie follows main character Skye and her bath and body business Lather and Luxury. Her childhood sweetheart arrives in town to help her improve it and sparks fly.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A hip Detroit detective (Eddie Murphy) drives out to Los Angeles and shows local police (Judge Reinhold, John Ashton) how to catch a killer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop. Axel Foley (Murphy) is back-back where he doesn't belong! He's going "deep, deep, deep undercover" into the chic wilds of Southern California, unleashing his arsenal of blazing gunfire and rapid-fire gags against a gang of international munitions smugglers. Back, too, are Judge Reinhold and John Ashton as Murphy's crime-busting sidekicks. And Top Gun's director Tony Scott keeps the pace fast, furious and funny.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Upon discovering a den of corrupt policemen, a journalist (Justin Timberlake) joins forces with his editor (Morgan Freeman) and a renowned private detective (Kevin Spacey) to bring the force down.

programme.title: Deadline
programme.desc: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Savannah, a single parent and consultant is hired to rebrand a New York radio show. When she accidently ends up on the air with the host, she discovers that love might have the last word after all.

programme.title: Harmony from the Heart
programme.desc: A music therapist and an established physician initially clash over the care of a shared patient. But as Valentine's Day approaches, they might find that music and love make excellent remedies.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Shrink Is In
programme.desc: A young woman impersonates a shrink to win over her Prince Charming.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: So You Said Yes
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A bridal shop owner clashes with the a competing business's owner.

programme.title: I Do, I Do, I Do
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An architect relives her disastrous wedding day over and over.

programme.title: Nearlyweds
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Complications arise when 3 women learn that their marriages are not official.

programme.title: Summer in the City
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A midwestern girl tries to adopt a big city personality with disastrous results.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Remember Me, Mommy?
programme.desc: Rebecca, a teacher at Clark Academy, an elite girls boarding school, has a secret.

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. A teacher's sex scandal with one of her students turns everything upside down.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: A guy relies on his newly acquired gladiator skills to save his ex-girlfriend from kidnappers.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: When a gangster is injured by The Punisher, he swears revenge and recruits an army of dangerous men.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Christopher abandons his possessions, gives his $24,000 savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: A working-class African-American father tries to raise his family in the 1950s

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: AMISTAD is about a 1839 mutiny onboard a slave ship that is traveling towards the Northeast Coast of America

programme.title: Buddy
programme.desc: An eccentric 1920s socialite raises a baby gorilla as her own child.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: One was a living legend, the other was just starting out... for both, the turning point will come at the Crossroads. Edited for TV

programme.title: Heartsounds
programme.desc: New York urologist Harold Lear (Garner) gets a taste of his own medicine when he suffers a heart attack and is confronted with a medical institution which doesn't seem equipped to help.

programme.title: Courage And The Passion
programme.desc: The story of test pilots, the women in their lives and the anxieties of personnel at an air force testing facility.

programme.title: Harriet Craig
programme.desc: Harriet Craig runs a household with an iron fist, manipulating others in order to keep her place perfect, no matter the cost.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: An aging New England Mayor is defeated in a hard-fought re-election campaign involving shady transactions by both political groups.

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: An outlandish, sidesplitting tale of the fortunes of the Duchy of Grand Fenwick.

programme.title: Too Many Husbands
programme.desc: An excellent romantic comedy starring Jean Arthur, who is married to Melvyn Douglas. When her first husband (Fred MacMurray), thought dead, shows up, he turns her world upside down. Comic tensions flare when both husbands vie for Arthur's affections. The two men finally become fed up with Arthur's love for attention--they leave and become friends.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: War and Peace
programme.desc: The personal stories of many characters, love affairs and philosophies are woven throughout this massive and intricate tapestry of Russia during Napoleon's invasion at the turn of the 19th century.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Cocoanuts
programme.desc: A group of zanies takes over a resort hotel in the days of the Florida land boom.

programme.title: The Glenn Miller Story
programme.desc: Tribute to the legendary big-band leader whose humble beginnings led to fame as a best-selling recording artist.

programme.title: Lady On a Train
programme.desc: A mystery writer helps a woman solve the murder that she witnessed from her train window.

programme.title: Becoming
programme.desc: The actor talks playing a Black Panther leader. Plus, Bob Odenkirk on being an unlikely action star.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: We rundown some of the most iconic James Cameron scenes ever put to film.

programme.title: Rotten Tomatoes is Wrong (Podcast)
programme.desc: Home Economics star Topher Grace geeks out with us about the Back to the Future trilogy.

programme.title: Cult Hero
programme.desc: Manager-summoning control freak Kallie Jones attempts to rescue her husband from a "wellness center" with the help of a washed-up expert, Cult Buster.

programme.title: On Our Way
programme.desc: A troubled filmmaker struggles to accept his latest piece of work as the story reveals how he lost the love of his life.

programme.title: Hit By Lightning
programme.desc: Loser Ricky (Jon Cryer) has given up on love, until he meets mysterious Danita through an online dating site.

programme.title: I Used To Go Here
programme.desc: Following the launch of her new novel, writer Kate Conklin is asked to speak at her alma mater by her old professor. Soon Kate finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students. Starring Gillian Jacobs, Jemaine Clement

programme.title: What Happened Last Night
programme.desc: Two college students, Danny and Sarah, are strangers until they wake up together after a night of partying.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and the Kappa Psi Psi prepare for the Gamma Fair. Liz receives the T-shirts she ordered to sell to raise money. The Gamma guys are busy, too, even with Pete underfoot. Joe gives Pete a task that is a little too much for him to handle. Meanwhile, Alan has inspired Anna in his Women's Lit class to change her appearance in hopes of catching a guy like Alan. Professor Presser is not impressed.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: The Gamma Pi Omicron Brothers take their pledges on retreat while Pete recuperates at the Gamma House. Back on campus, Sarah begins a friendship with Jordan while Allison convinces the Resident Director to give her what she wants.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Conundrum
programme.desc: A cop and her partner are trying to break a gambling racket in the Vietnamese community, but when the partner's wife is murdered, the two are up against the gangs, their fellow officers, and even each other.

programme.title: Nightmare Wedding
programme.desc: Sandy's past indiscretion with her fiancé's best friend Roman comes back to haunt her when he becomes their best man. Delusional and deranged, Roman will stop at nothing to make Sandy his own bride.

programme.title: Primal Secrets
programme.desc: The veneer of extravagant Manhattan and Long Island high society appears glamorous and alluring, but as this story demonstrates, grand appearances often lead to violent deceptions.

programme.title: Wedding Talk
programme.desc: From barns to train stations to botanical gardens to a Miami mansion, these weddings stand out from the crowd and deliver stunning visuals and big time fun.

programme.title: Christmas Catch
programme.desc: Detective Bennett is on the trail of a thief and goes undercover to find where he's hiding the loot. While undercover, she falls for the supposed thief and begins to suspect that he's been framed. Was he framed? Or are feelings clouding her judgment?

programme.title: The Gossip
programme.desc: Three people visit a mansion in a deserted village for certain reasons. And the 'gossip' war of them begins.

programme.title: Running Turtle
programme.desc: Phil-sung, a laid-back detective, begins his struggle to catch Ki-tae, an assassin who breaks out of prison.

programme.title: The Table (MINARI'S YE-RI HAN)
programme.desc: At the same table in the café, 4 pairs of people talked, their stories saturated with dream, hope, and fear.

programme.title: Love, So Divine
programme.desc: Theology student Kyu-shik meets Bong-hee before ordination. They bond deeply and are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Wish
programme.desc: Wish is a beautiful, confident, woman, who makes no apologies for who she is and what she does. Very sexually free, Wish goes after what she wants. If she feels like making out with a total stranger, she will. If she feels like bringing home the waitress, she will, and she will do it with the ruthlessness of a man, but with the finesse of a woman. Wish is a force to be reckoned with, until one day she meets a woman who turns her world upside down, and nothing will ever be the same.

programme.title: All Natural
programme.desc: A man with bad luck in relationships finally meets Mrs. Right, but she makes a hair-raising decision that challenges him to love her through the thick and thin.

programme.title: 16 Bars to Love
programme.desc: Niles and Mina are rappers who are pursuing a chance to audition for the hottest young producer in New York, Magic the Music Maker. They share a secret with each other that came from mysterious circumstances and as they experience beginning success as rappers, they must learn the truth of the secret about their family.

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Stacy is a freshman at a Historic Black College & University. She Meets and falls in love with a Grad Student named Benjamin. He's nice and charming at first. Until he starts to control her and physically, psychologically, and verbally abuse her. Can Stacy get out of this domestic violence relationship before it's too late?

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Nine Lives (aka: Unstoppable)
programme.desc: Dean Cage is a former CIA agent who suffers from extreme PTSD. While in a program to resolve the stress of the loss his brother-in-law, he is mistaken for an FBI agent and thrust into action.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: A father (John Cusack) gets entangled in the latest assignment of a dangerous assassin (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic II" sets sail.

programme.title: Phantom Racer
programme.desc: Seventeen years after his rival's fiery death, race car driver Sawyer realizes he is back for revenge.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: After a massive asteroid crashes into the moon, it's discovered that the moon's structure is now entirely unstable, threatening all life on Earth.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Michael Bublé
programme.desc: Caught in the Act is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Bublé. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert. The concert featured a few guest artists, including Laura Pausini, Chris Botti, and with an unexpected comedic banter with Bublé, Josh Groban.

programme.desc: It was a public holiday in Britain as the nation celebrated a Royal Wedding...the same day, things had all got too much for Anxiang Du. He had set up a Chinese Herbal medicine business with a fellow Chinese national, but things had turned sour. Years of litigation ended one fateful day in defeat for Du in a case against his Commercial partner 'Jeff' Ding. Du's decision to leave a note suggesting he was to commit suicide alerted his wife who, in turn, told Police. Already looking for him, Police are alerted to the slaughter of a Chinese family...Mr and Mrs Ding and their two daughters - was Du the killer?

programme.title: A Killer's Mistake
programme.desc: Boxer Shaun “the governor” Cummins was a big name in his hometown. When he was paralysed in an accident, Thomas Dunkley, an amateur fighter, became Shaun's friend and defacto carer. Shaun promised to make him rich, but when the payday never came, Dunkley took what he thought was rightfully his.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane, a single mom, lives in a typical new home development with her two kids. Since the day they moved into the brand new home, they have been plagued with repeated plumbing and heating issues. During a recent winter cold spell, the porch ceiling caved in, exposin g questionable minimum building code practices and building materials- luckily, Mike and his team have the right answers.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Explore the downsides of custom building as Mike tours a headache of a house.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Nancie and Woody moved into a 25-year-old townhouse that required some updating- particularly the floors and the "tiny" kitchen space. As renovations got underway, Woody was unexpectedly hospitalized. The contractors were left virtually unsupervised while Nancie tried to manage her job, visit Woody and take care of their daughter. All of the contractors were very sympathetic to her stating, "don't worry about the renovations- you are in good hands." What they left behind was simply one big mistake- one that Mike and the team will correct, with the help of a Country singing guest star.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Explore the downsides of custom building as Mike tours a headache of a house.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane, a single mom, lives in a typical new home development with her two kids. programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Hard Turns Ahead
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Minutes of Fame
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount. Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the world's most bumbling guards, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner, and Lou, Froy, and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers.

programme.title: New Truck Day
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Monk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. programme.desc: “Vacation Friends” star Meredith Hagner stops by to chat and shares her favorite upcycling tips. Then, crochet prodigy and Drew's Crew member Jonah Larson stops by to kick-off a new segment Crochet & A, where Jonah answers viewers crocheting questions. Plus, meet Drew- Gooder Patti Peck, who has been saving and providing food for her community for the past 22 years.

Plus, Drew and Alicia are joined by dating expert Damona Hoffman, who educates them on red flags as they both navigate the world of online dating. Then, Drew continues her Cookbook Countdown, in advance of the release of her first cookbook “Rebel Homemaker,” and is joined by Molly Yeh to Pilar Valdes to whip up tasty Italian dishes. Plus, it's a very special Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up including a woman who went viral for sending her resume on a cake to Nike to try to score an interview.

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Hardly any other area is as unspoiled as the Yukon Delta in western Alaska. This fascinating network of swamps and river arms looks like a landscape at the beginning of mankind. Only 25,000 people live in this barren region, which is almost as big as Greece. Most of these inhabitants are indigenous and belong to the ethnic group of the Yupik. They make their living on the steep banks of the Yukon River. And in their villages, built on piles to protect them against flooding, you can see the effects of climate changes on nature - and on the community life of the indigenous population. On the trail of the national fish of Alaska, the salmon, the film follows the Yukon River and follows moose hunters, migratory birds and scientists who do research in the delta.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the worlds hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.
